step_results.output_excerpt:
# Device Local Fixture

This directory contains stable local files for RustClaw NL regression tests.

- `configs/app_config.toml`: sample runtime config
- `docs/`: sample docs and notes
- `logs/`: sample log files
- `data/test_contract.sqlite`: sample SQLite database
- `tmp/test_bundle.zip`: sample archive

result_json.text: 本目录包含用于本地设备（device_local）场景的测试夹具文件，提供了模拟本地存储或本地文件系统行为的测试数据集合。
